hero.title: WE ARE
hero.subtitle: More than a club, we're a crew. We run the trails of La Sénia and the Terres de l'Ebre, sharing kilometres, laughs, and the best post-run in the territory.
hero.imageAlt: XEIC RUNNERS running through the trails of La Sénia

founders.title: The Origin of Xeic
founders.whoText: We are a group of friends from La Sénia who one day decided that running alone was boring. What started as an informal meetup has become the most active running club in the area.
founders.whyText: Because we believe in sport as a tool for social cohesion. Because we love our territory and want everyone to discover it while getting fit.
founders.communityText: No one gets left behind here. We adapt the pace so everyone can enjoy the outing.

events.title: Upcoming Meetups
events.subtitle: Don't think twice and come to the next one.

routes.title: Explore the Routes
routes.subtitle: We've mapped the best corners of La Sénia. Follow us on Strava and download the tracks.

community.title: The
community.subtitle: We're not just a club, we're a big family. There are no winners or losers here, just runners wanting to have a great time.
community.activeMembers: active runners in the XEIC community.
community.quote1: More than kilometres, we collect unforgettable moments.

cta.title: We're waiting for you, Xeic!
cta.subtitle: We're just a click away. Join our WhatsApp group and start running tomorrow.

founders.title: The soul of La Sénia running through the trails.
founders.quote: "XEIC!" It's not just an expression, it's the battle cry of a community that understands running as the thread that connects people of our land.

history.title: Our story
history.text1: XEIC RUNNERS was born one foggy morning around a café in the Plaça Major. We were Alicia, Laura, Teo and Robert. We just wanted one simple thing: to run with people, share moments and create a community around the sport and the town we love.
history.text2: What started as an informal Sunday meetup has become the sporting heart of La Sénia.

social.title: Social by nature
social.text: Sport is the excuse; the after-run beer and proper breakfasts are our real goal.

territory.title: Rooted in the territory
territory.text: We know every corner of Els Ports and every ancient olive grove path like the back of our hand.

values.title: Our Values
values.subtitle: The compass that guides us every kilometre.

inclusion.title: Total Inclusion
inclusion.text: We don't care if you run a kilometre in 4 minutes or 10. If you want to move, you're already a XEIC RUNNER.

sustainability.title: Environmental Respect
sustainability.text: We care for La Sénia and its natural environment. We run without leaving a trace, protecting our landscapes.

effort.title: Spirit of Improvement
effort.text: We help each member achieve their own goals, no matter how small. We grow together.

identity.title: Local Identity
identity.text: We are proudly from La Sénia. We carry our village name wherever we go, with a smile.

teo.quote: As long as there's a path, there's an adventure.

robert.quote: Running connects us with the land and with ourselves.

jordi.quote: At XEIC, no one ever runs alone.

saber.quote: The best pace is the one that makes you happy.

cta.title: Want to be a XEIC?
cta.subtitle: We're not looking for champions, we're looking for people who want to experience sport from a different angle.

routes.heroSubtitle: From the plains of La Sénia to the peaks of Els Ports. Choose your challenge.
routes.ctaText: Join our Strava club to see all XEIC community activities, routes and challenges.

events.title: Upcoming Meetups
events.subtitle: Don't think twice and come to the next one.
events.ctaSubtitle: Join the WhatsApp group to receive all notifications for upcoming events.

community.title: The
community.subtitle: We're not just a club, we're a big family.
community.quote1: More than kilometres, we collect unforgettable moments.
community.quote2: The best pace is the one that makes you happy.

footer.tagline: Running through the Terres de l'Ebre.
